item.title: Drone hits Dubai airport as Iran targets commerce; Israel says war will go on
item.description: As Tehran continued strikes on targets across the Gulf region, Israel said it would hit Iran for “as long as needed” and expanded ground operations in Lebanon.

item.title: Deportees sent by Trump to Salvadoran prison are still stuck a year later
item.description: Little is known about the status or whereabouts of the Salvadorans deported by President Donald Trump to CECOT, an infamous megaprison.

item.title: To criticize an American-led war, an American pope turns to allies
item.description: A split-screen response shows how Pope Leo is navigating a minefield as the Trump administration projects American nativism at home and deadly force overseas.

item.title: Trump says U.S. struck Kharg Island, core of Iran’s oil economy
item.description: The strikes destroyed more than 90 military targets, including missile facilities, but preserved oil infrastructure, U.S. Central Command said Saturday.

item.title: Kids in hospital help penguins woo mates with painted pebbles
item.description: “I always get really emotional when the pebbles go in,” said Rebecca Parr, who works for the Royal Zoological Society of Scotland.
